page.restrictedBody: Only administrators can view this panel.
page.title: Admin
page.subtitle: Platform administration and system configuration.

roleLimits.title: Role limits
roleLimits.subtitle: Default quotas per role (superadmin has no limit). Empty = unlimited.

userLimits.title: User limits
userLimits.subtitle: Per-user overrides (empty = use role limit). Superadmin only.

capacity.title: Usage and limits
capacity.subtitle: Quota usage summary by user and project. Threshold: >=80% near limit, >=100% at limit.

activations.title: User activation
activations.subtitle: Users registered through the public page remain pending until an admin activates them.

projectAccess.title: Project access
projectAccess.subtitle: Define which users can view and edit each project.
projectAccess.selectProject: Select a project to manage its members.

knowledge.integrationHelp: Used for global and project sources. Connect here to manage from Admin.
knowledge.connectHelp: Connect a Google Drive account to create global or project knowledge sources.
knowledge.createSectionHint: Add a curated URL or a Drive-backed source. Fields update based on type.
knowledge.sourcesRegistryHint: Filter by scope. Sync and delete apply per row.
knowledge.curatedUrlHelp: Add the page URL (one per source). Only that page is indexed on sync.
knowledge.guideBody: SAP Help pages are indexed only when readable content exists in initial HTML. Pages that render everything via JavaScript cannot be indexed by this flow. If a URL fails, try another curated page or use a document/PDF as alternative.
knowledge.sapHelpBody: Only help.sap.com URLs. Do not use community.sap.com (those pages rely on JavaScript and cannot be indexed here).
knowledge.sapOfficialBody: Approved official SAP documentation (for example help.sap.com and other official sources).
knowledge.officialWebBody: Curated public pages (for example community.sap.com and other domains). If a page requires JavaScript or anti-bot verification, sync will fail with a clear message.
knowledge.emptyGlobal: No global sources yet. Create one so Sapito can use reusable knowledge (for example SAP Help or Google Drive).
knowledge.syncHintSap: Add SAP page URL in source
knowledge.syncHintDrive: Configure Google Drive account and external ref (folder ID) in source
knowledge.syncOnlyHint: Sync available only for Google Drive or official SAP (sap_help, sap_official, official_web)
knowledge.syncWithErrors: Sync completed with errors. {docs} documents, {chunks} chunks.

users.title: Users
users.name: Name
users.empty: No users yet. Create one above.

roles.title: Roles and permissions
roles.subtitle: Permission matrix by role. Platform roles are assigned on the user profile; project roles are assigned per project.
roles.platformSectionHint: Define what a user can do across the entire platform.
roles.projectSectionHint: Assigned inside each project to control project-specific access.
roles.signInRequired: You must sign in to view this page.
roles.footer: This matrix is used for access control. Permissions are read from database role tables.

errors.noPermission: You do not have permission to view this page.

knowledgeSources.restrictedBody: Only administrators can view this page.
